data.name: S.X.E. Slider
data.detailed_description:
S.X.E. Slider is a space-themed sliding tile puzzle game with a sci-fi theme.
It features 25 puzzles with varying difficulty and a relaxing soundtrack.

Gameplay:

Slide puzzle pieces in order to complete the image.
Once a puzzle is completed, you can view the full image on the menu.

Features:

  • 25 Beautiful Puzzles
  • Varying Puzzle Difficulty
  • Chill Soundtrack
  • Full Controller Support
  • High Quality Features

英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/10/11
  • 處理器: 4+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 9 Compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 4+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 4096 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X 9 Compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
